SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GABRIELLE CASTRO--PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARTENFELS, CASEY BURKE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRIBUSS, AR MONICA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
